title: LCX8 P2-T05 Vault component/API action source trace
scope: Trace VaultSurface, document detail, email filing, sidebar, shared Panel, vault API re-export, and apiClient boundaries into Vault rows. Backfill sidebar-reachable Vault detail/email visible missing-handler/unavailable feature rows absent from earlier inventory. MatterVaultPanel rows are covered by P2-T04 and remain out of this P2-T05 row scope.

lazyweb_reference.use: Reference only; local Vault source/API trace drives classifications.

anchors.description: PageHeader refresh button and section rendering for documents/detail/email
Vault detail renders DocumentDetail and version-record Panel
read-only document detail panel hides storage pointer and document bytes
Vault legal-hold and privilege badge strip
Vault utilities render buttons without handlers
Panel renders shared overflow icon-button without handler
Vault API client re-exports fetchVaultDocuments and Matter Vault helpers from apiClient.js
fetchVaultDocuments GET /api/vault/documents shape validation and permission context
Matter-filtered Vault documents/search/audit helpers, covered by P2-T04 MatterVault rows

row_updates.label: 새로고침

row_updates.outcome: API/external-runtime-backed action remains BLOCKED pending P3/P4 proof
